description: CompositionBlack polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has tape detailing on the in-seam of the ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, branding embroidered on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish polo t-shirt with its short gathered sleeves enhances your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and sneakers or cotton shorts and sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
